title: Prof Jiang’s Wildest Predictions Explained (Predictive History Primer)
full_text: What's up, weirdos? I'm sure you've seen this guy come across your feed recently. >> I hope everyone had a nice break and welcome back to the end of the world. >> This is Professor Xiang, aka the prophet of China, and he's famous for predicting world events way in advance, like this banger >> back in uh 2024. You made three big predictions. >> First is that Trump will win uh in November. Second is that um United States will go to war against Iran. >> Spot on so far. >> The third big prediction is that the United States will lose this war which will forever change the global order. >> What? Well, now you're asking where he gets all of his information, his facts, and his evidence. Well, I mean I mean again I I don't actually use documentary evidence in my classes. I use a lot of first principal thinking, right? Because what I do is I create frameworks. I create models of of the world and then I test it. I validate by testing it by making predictions about it. Okay. As someone who's been following him on YouTube for a couple of years and have gotten through hours of his 63-hour history of civilization, I figured I'd make a primer so everyone can kind of understand where this guy's coming from and get more of his wild thoughts. And trust me, it gets wild. So, I've created this video which is a primer for Professor Ciang's hottest hot takes. By the end of this, you should get a pretty good idea of who he is and you'll probably want to subscribe to his channel. Strap in. World War II is being driven by an apocalyptic script. Jiang argues that the US Iran war would collapse American hijgemony and permanently reshape the global order and that it's all fueled by elite fanatics who believe the Middle East war will trigger an end of times prophecy. >> There's no reason why the miracle of the reestablishment of the temple on the temple mount is not possible. >> On that note, the world is secretly run by the Illuminati. According to Xiang, modern governments are only the surface level to power. Behind them sits three secret societies who combine to make the Illuminati. Those networks are the Jesuits influencing the Vatican, Sabatian Frankst shaping Israel power structures and Freemasons embedded in the American national security state. An alien invasion could be staged as the ultimate SCOP. Ciang says elites could stage a fake extraterrestrial invasion. The goal frame the aliens as demonic forces and usher in a new global belief system. And if that sounds crazy, Xiang actually says we've already been doing this for thousands of years. According to him, powerful groups have always used myths and belief systems to shape how entire civilizations think. Which brings me to ancient myths were the first propaganda. Jiang argues that civilizations used mythology to explain why kings ruled and everyone else obeyed. Stories about gods conquering chaos or defeating monsters weren't just entertainment. They are ways of teaching us to stay in our place. In fact, I've heard it said that the word Lord in the Bible was specifically there to train your brain to worship your Lord, meaning your master, meaning the guy who's employing you, meaning your master. Jeang claims the Apostle Paul may have functioned as a political operative, possibly a Roman secret agent who transformed Jesus's mystical teachings into an imperial religion designed for mass control. Go ahead. Public religion is for the masses, but secret religions are for the elites. Jiang argues that elites throughout history practiced hidden mystical religions while the population followed official faiths. Religion in his model doubled as both a spiritual system and a coordination mechanism for power. And if you look at the Epstein files, there's plenty of evidence of this going on. Civilization itself is basically a shared hallucination. Humans don't perceive reality directly. We filter it through language. When millions of people share the same stories and vocabulary, a civilization emerges. That is the shared hallucination. To go deeper, poets literally create reality. Jiang believes poets and storytellers shape the mental frameworks that societies live inside of. Figures like Homer didn't just write stories. They built a narrative architecture that entire civilizations now inhabit. I'll leave you to make sense of that. The universe stores all human consciousness from all time like a cosmic internet. According to Xiang, every mind that has ever existed still exists in a universal memory field through meditation or deep reflection. Humans may be able to access those minds. This tracks if you've listened to the telepathy tapes and they talk about us living in some kind of psychic field where energy is transferred kind of like we're human cell phones. So yeah, I'm on board with this. Oh, here's a fun one. The antichrist won't be a person. It'll be an AI operating system and it may already be here. Ciang argues that the logical endpoint for Western civilization is an AI run surveillance state. In orthodox prophecies, he says the kind of global technocratic power is exactly what the antichrist is supposed to look like. Go subscribe to predictive history if you want your mind melted. It's worth a trip. It's worth the countless hours you're going to spend going down rabbit hole after rabbit hole. And as a person who had a near-death experience, his inferences echo a lot of the information I was given in my time spent talking to you know who. And subscribe to WeirdWire for more fringe news and discoveries. We're dropping videos every day looking for the obscure stories from around the globe that other people are not covering like serial killer elephants, murderers who swear they could summon genies, African doomsday prophets, and the booming exorcism tourism market going on in Russia. >> Give credit to these guys like George HW Bush. He was clearly the mastermind behind uh 911.
